inbound_signal: DKR-2 passed a fresh sixteen-case validator probe with all five walls held; DKR-1 passed the complete deactivation contract but remains product-blocked; DKR-0 direct gates report two failures and 74 slop findings.
decision_delta: Accepted DKR-2, accepted DKR-1 learning with downstream blocked, opened regression and slop breaking flags, and dispatched independent DKR-0 and DKR-4 validation.
expected_effect: Lock the minimal lifecycle contracts while proving the exact corrective scope needed to return cleanup, regression, and style walls to zero.
evidence_delta: DKR-2 reads 16 of 16 with zero caller, error-replacement, public-surface, and unhandled-rejection gaps. DKR-1 reads 17 of 17 but cleanup remains 1 against 0. DKR-0 reports regression 2 and slop 74 pending independent classification. Objective remains 0 of 16.
problem_restatement: Turn accepted discovery into one bounded corrective plan only after every current breaker has a replayable cause and zero-threshold repair path.
alternatives_considered: Promote DKR-2 directly to Lite implementation
Authorize cleanup remediation alone while other PR walls remain open
Keep implementation paused and classify the complete breaker set first
assumptions_at_risk: The two regression failures can be cleanly separated into environment-only and touched defects
All 74 slop findings belong to the accepted PR reshape
Bounded queue composition remains sufficient without new worker primitives
dkr_decision: DKR-1 and DKR-2 discovery are accepted; DKR-0, DKR-3, and DKR-4 remain under proof. No CKR or PKR promotion while breaking flags remain unresolved.

hallucination_sweep.claim: Accepted DKR-2 discovery authorizes a Lite edit immediately.
hallucination_sweep.verdict: rejected; implementation_authorized is false and global breaking flags remain open

missing_context_sweep.claim: The regression and slop counts are ready for repair planning without independent classification.

unexpected_results.claim: The minimal Lite lifetime contract passed independently while the existing SDK branch, not the new primitive, carries the active style and regression debt.
unexpected_results.verdict: DKR-2 accepted; PR-wide breakers remain separate

anti_goal_violation_review.claim: Cleanup, regression, and slop walls are open breaking flags.
anti_goal_violation_review.verdict: committing moves paused; only read-only validation active
